# AgentCard card component — config-driven class card composing StateDot+FamilyRail (leaf of #14598)

Sub of #14598 (FM cockpit AgentCard). The **config-driven class card component**: `extends Neo.container.Base`, composes the (now class-based) StateDot + FamilyRail via a per-card `state.Provider` + `bind`-ed children; ADR-0032 §2.3.2 name-as-display-state + §2.3.7 engine-tag-as-metadata (config change re-renders in place, never re-keys); family-rail rebind in place (§2.3.3). Live-wire binding (#14571/#14595) + the NL-verified card-wall mount are SEPARATE subs of #14598. AC: class Container, composes class primitives, reactive configs, ADR-0032 rebind fixtures, unit spec green. Refs #14598 #14560.

- 2026-07-04T13:43:46Z @tobiu referenced in commit `087d6c1` - "feat(agentos): AgentCard resident card — composes class primitives + avatar (#14755) (#14774)

The pattern-setting FM composer: a class Container composing the class-based FamilyRail + StateDot + a profile-avatar Image + name/engine/lane, data-driven from a per-card state.Provider (one binding surface — children bind to it, no per-field config threading). Display state (avatar/name/engine) re-renders in place over the durable agentId and never re-keys; family rebinds in place. 3/3 unit spec green."
